subtitle: The 1.46 km city beach a ninth-century poet named after his own pen name, now a wall of supertall towers, an annual ten-million-visitor crowd, and a national-trauma disaster film.
spike_statement: No other beach is both the most photographed crowd in a country and the title of that country's first blockbuster disaster film.

levers.photo_tone: high-rise glare on flat summer sand, parasols edge to edge, glass towers behind
